title: API Boundary Documentation (pandas/polars)
summary: API Boundary Documentation verified: return_polars parameter works correctly (pandas default, polars opt-in). Found discrepancy: CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT env var documented incorrectly - CLAUDE.md says "Default to Polars output" with default "false" but the flag is defined (default=True) but never actually used in the codebase.

tests: Python test verifying return_polars=False returns pandas DataFrame
Python test verifying return_polars=True returns polars DataFrame
